all_cases.description: Init creates notebook control files.
Notebook discovery uses cwd, environment variable, and global flag precedence.
New note with explicit id, title, directory, print-path, and stdin body creates content.
Duplicate explicit note output path fails without overwriting existing content.
List JSON parses frontmatter title, tags, wiki links, Markdown links, and word count.

setup_files.{nb}/alpha.md:
---
title: Alpha Note
tags: [math, inbox]
---
# Ignored Heading
See [Beta](beta.md) and [[Gamma Note]].

all_cases.description: Title fallback uses first heading and then filename stem.
Tag listing combines YAML tags, keywords, hashtags, and colon tags.
Tag expressions support OR and NOT filters.
Direct link-to and linked-by filters resolve Markdown and wiki links.
Recursive linked-by traversal honors max-distance.
Repeated exact matches, exclude prefixes, and limit compose in list output.
Path descending sort suffix orders path output deterministically.
Word-count descending sort uses parsed note body size.

setup_files.{nb}/long.md:
# Long
one two three four five

all_cases.description: Graph JSON emits nodes and edges for linked notes.
Invalid regex match fails with useful stderr.
List outside a notebook fails clearly.
Named config filters apply tag and exclude defaults to list output.
Config note defaults drive new-note title and filename template rendering.
Newly created notes feed tag discovery and graph edge output.
Frontmatter, hashtags, colon tags, OR/NOT filters, and graph filtering compose.
Recursive links, orphan detection, and missing backlinks agree on the same graph.
Named config filters, excludes, and recursive links compose over notebook state.
Created notes with different body sizes are filtered and sorted by word count descending.

steps.stdin:
# Long
#draft one two three four five

all_cases.description: Duplicate note creation fails without corrupting existing graph state.
Parsed titles feed wiki-link resolution and graph output.
Tag counts and note-count descending sort reflect all parsed tag sources.
Notebook precedence and named filters select the correct persisted notebook state.
Regex match, tag expression, exclude, limit, and title sort compose.
A note created before its wiki-link target is resolved against the later complete notebook state.
List filtering applies sorting before limiting so the selected slice reflects final title order.
